Operation 'calculateDensityAltitude' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description is too brief and lacks context about what inputs are required, what the output represents, and why it matters for flight planning. Added specificity about the three required parameters (pressure, temperature, dew point), explained the concept for non-aviation users, clarified the output format, and emphasized its importance for VFR flight planning. This helps AI agents understand when and why to use this calculation.

data.current_description: Calculate density altitude from station conditions.
data.summary_suggestion: Calculate density altitude from station conditions
data.description_suggestion: Calculates density altitude using station pressure, temperature, and dew point data. Density altitude is the altitude at which the aircraft will perform as if it were at that elevation under standard atmospheric conditions. Returns the calculated density altitude in feet. This is critical for VFR flight planning to assess aircraft performance on hot or high-elevation runways.
data.reasoning: Original description is too brief and lacks context about what inputs are required, what the output represents, and why it matters for flight planning. Added specificity about the three required parameters (pressure, temperature, dew point), explained the concept for non-aviation users, clarified the output format, and emphasized its importance for VFR flight planning. This helps AI agents understand when and why to use this calculation.

message: Operation 'getCommunicationFrequencies' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description lacks clarity about what constitutes a 'facility', what input parameters are expected, and what the response structure contains. Added context about facility types (airports, navaids, ATC), clarified that results are organized by type and purpose, and explained the operational importance for flight planning. This enables AI agents to understand when to query this endpoint and how to interpret results.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve radio frequencies for aviation facilities
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves radio communication frequencies for aviation facilities such as airports, navigation aids, and air traffic control centers. Accepts facility identifier or location parameters to filter results. Returns a list of frequencies organized by facility type and purpose (e.g., ATIS, ground control, approach). Essential for flight planning and in-flight communications.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks clarity about what constitutes a 'facility', what input parameters are expected, and what the response structure contains. Added context about facility types (airports, navaids, ATC), clarified that results are organized by type and purpose, and explained the operational importance for flight planning. This enables AI agents to understand when to query this endpoint and how to interpret results.

message: Operation 'listAirspace' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Description is too vague about filtering capabilities and return values. AI agents need clarity on what parameters filter results and what airspace attributes are returned to determine if this operation meets their flight planning needs.

data.current_description: Query controlled and special-use airspace areas.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve controlled and special-use airspace areas with geographic or identifier-based filtering. Returns airspace boundaries, classifications, and usage restrictions relevant to VFR flight planning.
data.reasoning: Description is too vague about filtering capabilities and return values. AI agents need clarity on what parameters filter results and what airspace attributes are returned to determine if this operation meets their flight planning needs.

message: Operation 'getMetars' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Current description lacks specificity about filtering options and return data structure. AI agents need to understand what parameters are available (airport codes, location, time) and what weather elements are included in responses to properly utilize this operation for flight planning.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieve METAR surface weather observations for specified airports or geographic areas. Returns decoded METAR data including wind, visibility, precipitation, temperature, and altimeter settings. Supports filtering by airport identifier, location, or time range for VFR flight planning.
data.reasoning: Current description lacks specificity about filtering options and return data structure. AI agents need to understand what parameters are available (airport codes, location, time) and what weather elements are included in responses to properly utilize this operation for flight planning.

message: Operation 'getTafs' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Description is too minimal. AI agents need to understand the forecast period, what weather elements are included, and how to filter by airport to determine if this operation supports their flight planning requirements.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieve Terminal Aerodrome Forecasts (TAFs) for specified airports. Returns forecast weather including wind, visibility, precipitation, and significant weather phenomena for the next 24-30 hours. Supports filtering by airport identifier for route weather briefing and flight planning.
data.reasoning: Description is too minimal. AI agents need to understand the forecast period, what weather elements are included, and how to filter by airport to determine if this operation supports their flight planning requirements.

message: Operation 'getPireps' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Description lacks detail about filtering options and what pilot observations are included. data.description_suggestion: Retrieve Pilot Reports (PIREPs) for specified airports or geographic areas. data.reasoning: Description lacks detail about filtering options and what pilot observations are included. AI agents need clarity on geographic/altitude filtering capabilities and the types of weather phenomena reported to effectively use this for real-time flight condition assessment.

message: Operation 'getSigmets' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Description is too generic about filtering and return content. AI agents need to understand what geographic filtering is available, what types of hazardous phenomena are included in SIGMETs, and how to use this for route-specific weather hazard identification during flight planning.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieve domestic SIGMET weather advisories for significant meteorological phenomena affecting flight operations. data.reasoning: Description is too generic about filtering and return content. AI agents need to understand what geographic filtering is available, what types of hazardous phenomena are included in SIGMETs, and how to use this for route-specific weather hazard identification during flight planning.

data.current_description: Retrieve a composite weather briefing along a route.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve a composite weather briefing for a planned flight route. Accepts departure airport, destination airport, and optional altitude as inputs. Returns aggregated weather data including METARs, TAFs, SIGMETs, and PIREPs along the route for comprehensive flight planning.
data.reasoning: Current description lacks detail about inputs and outputs. Enhanced version specifies the 3 parameters (departure, destination, altitude), clarifies that it aggregates multiple weather data types (METARs, TAFs, SIGMETs, PIREPs), and explains the briefing's purpose for route planning to improve AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'calculateCrosswind' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Description lacks specificity about inputs and outputs. Enhanced version details the 3 required parameters (wind speed, direction, runway heading), specifies units (knots, degrees), and clarifies the output components (crosswind, headwind, tailwind) to help AI agents understand how to use this E6B calculation tool.

data.current_description: Calculate crosswind component for runway operations.
data.description_suggestion: Calculate crosswind and headwind components using wind speed, direction, and runway heading. Accepts wind speed (knots), wind direction (degrees), and runway magnetic heading as inputs. Returns crosswind component, headwind component, and tailwind component for runway suitability assessment.
data.reasoning: Description lacks specificity about inputs and outputs. Enhanced version details the 3 required parameters (wind speed, direction, runway heading), specifies units (knots, degrees), and clarifies the output components (crosswind, headwind, tailwind) to help AI agents understand how to use this E6B calculation tool.

Operation 'calculateDensityAltitude' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description is too brief and lacks context about what inputs are required, what the output represents, and why it matters for flight planning. Added specificity about the three required parameters (pressure, temperature, dew point), explained the concept for non-aviation users, clarified the output format, and emphasized its importance for VFR flight planning. This helps AI agents understand when and why to use this calculation.

data.current_description: Calculate density altitude from station conditions.
data.summary_suggestion: Calculate density altitude from station conditions
data.description_suggestion: Calculates density altitude using station pressure, temperature, and dew point data. Density altitude is the altitude at which the aircraft will perform as if it were at that elevation under standard atmospheric conditions. Returns the calculated density altitude in feet. This is critical for VFR flight planning to assess aircraft performance on hot or high-elevation runways.
data.reasoning: Original description is too brief and lacks context about what inputs are required, what the output represents, and why it matters for flight planning. Added specificity about the three required parameters (pressure, temperature, dew point), explained the concept for non-aviation users, clarified the output format, and emphasized its importance for VFR flight planning. This helps AI agents understand when and why to use this calculation.

message: Operation 'getCommunicationFrequencies' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Added context about facility types (airports, navaids, ATC), clarified that results are organized by type and purpose, and explained the operational importance for flight planning. This enables AI agents to understand when to query this endpoint and how to interpret results.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve radio frequencies for aviation facilities
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves radio communication frequencies for aviation facilities such as airports, navigation aids, and air traffic control centers. Accepts facility identifier or location parameters to filter results. Returns a list of frequencies organized by facility type and purpose (e.g., ATIS, ground control, approach). Essential for flight planning and in-flight communications.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks clarity about what constitutes a 'facility', what input parameters are expected, and what the response structure contains. Added context about facility types (airports, navaids, ATC), clarified that results are organized by type and purpose, and explained the operational importance for flight planning. This enables AI agents to understand when to query this endpoint and how to interpret results.
